sc_sutta: 110 “For these two, defilements grow. What two? One who perceives what is unallowable as allowable, and one who perceives what is allowable as unallowable. These are the two whose defilements grow.”
sutta: Monks these two persons are hard to find in the world what to the one who is first to do a favor and he who is grateful for what is done these are the two persons hard to find in the world or that's the end of the sutta
commentary: you see this person who is first to do a favor few people would would want to do a kind deed towards somebody unless uh he owes that person a kind deed for a person to do a favor first means he he he is willing to do without any precondition that kind of person is rare to find and then also a person who is grateful very often we find that we have done something for somebody here and later when we need a favor from him he's forgotten that we have been kind to him before so these are the two persons hard to find now
